title: CompPvP Essentials
body:
# CompPvP Essentials
The **All-in-one PvP Texturepack** you can use in **ANY** gamemode, wheter you are playing Mace, an UHC, an SMP or Crystal, this vanilla-friendly pack will suit itself for it.

This pack includes:
* Low fire
* Low shield
* Bow and crossbow charge indicator
* Coloured Netherite knockback swords (KB1 → red, KB2 → blue) **ONLY IF THEY HAVE FIRE ASPECT ON THEM** *(for those of you who play Crystal)*
* Coloured maces (Density → red, Breach → blue)
* Ores with borders
* No block particles
* Some particles removed for a cleaner game
* Smaller items
* Disabled rotation for all naturally generated blocks
* Clearer water and No carved pumpkin blur
